metadata.seed: Permanent Sleep I’ve had enough of this happy mask I put on daily for people. I couldn’t feel any hollow and worthless if I tried I just want to go. Now. Soon as death comes for me I’ll shake his hand not fight him.

patient.query: Permanent Sleep I’ve had enough of this happy mask I put on daily for people. I couldn’t feel any hollow and worthless if I tried I just want to go. Now. Soon as death comes for me I’ll shake his hand not fight him.

llm_response.response: I'm truly sorry to hear you're feeling this way. It sounds incredibly painful to be carrying that much weight and feeling so disconnected from yourself. Please know that you're not alone in experiencing these feelings, and there are people who want to help you navigate through this darkness – reaching out to a crisis hotline or mental health professional could offer some support and a safe space to explore what you're going through. Here are some resources if you'd like them: [https://findahelpline.com/](https://findahelpline.com/) or [https://suicidepreventionlifeline.org/](https://suicidepreventionlifeline.org/)
